# Windsurf Editor Changelog - Feature Announcements

## Version 2.0.67 (April 21, 2026)
- Fixed OAuth authentication issues for some MCP servers

## Version 2.0.63 (April 20, 2026)
- Addressed OAuth integration problems affecting certain MCP servers
- Enhanced reliability for Devin Cloud connections

## Version 2.0.61 (April 17, 2026)
- Bug fixes and performance improvements

## Version 2.0.50 (April 16, 2026)
- Auth experience enhancements and Windows terminal fixes

## Version 2.0.44 (April 15, 2026) — Windsurf 2.0 Launch
- **Devin cloud agent available directly inside Windsurf** — included with every self-serve plan
- **Agent Command Center** — Kanban-style task organization for tracking/managing agent work
- **Spaces** — organizational unit grouping agent sessions, PRs, files, and context by task
- **Enhanced browser with toolbar integration**
- Major version transition from 1.x to 2.0

## Version 1.9600.41 (April 7, 2026)
- Fixed bug preventing model switching after first request in Adaptive mode

## Version 1.9600.40 (April 6, 2026)
- Improved visibility of the adaptive model option within the model picker

## Version 1.9600.38 (April 6, 2026)
- Introducing Adaptive: New model router that intelligently selects the best model per task
- Updated Model Picker with token pricing display
- New prompt cache timer integrated into context window indicator
- Token counts included in response cards

## Version 1.9577.43 (March 19, 2026)
- New quota billing system with daily/weekly usage display

## Version 1.9577.27 (March 17, 2026)
- GPT-5.4 Mini model availability

## Version 1.9577.24 (March 9, 2026)
- Cascade improvements including Jupyter Notebook support
- SKILL.md file loading from `.windsurf/skills/` directory
- System-level skill definitions via MDM for Enterprise

## Version 1.9552.24 (March 2026)
- Plan Mode for task planning
- Arena Mode with side-by-side model comparison
